name: richard-nixon
description: John Farrell's Richard Nixon: The Life — extract lessons from Nixon's rise, triumph, and fall: resilience, foreign policy genius, leadership under pressure, the dangers of paranoia, and political strategy
useCase: Helps leaders, students of politics, and anyone interested in power understand both the art of political comeback and the dangers of unchecked ambition — through the definitive Nixon biography.
knownRisks: Nixon's story is complex and controversial — the skill aims to extract lessons without endorsing unethical behavior
